flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Central College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (39.8% → 29.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 13 pp at South Central College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (28.6% vs 41.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Central College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Central College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (47.6% → 59.0%).
